versions.name: Pamlico Sea Base
versions.summary: High-adventure camp on the Pamlico River in Blounts Creek, adjacent to Camp Boddie, run by the East Carolina Council. Offers treks including sea kayaking along the Outer Banks and Cape Lookout, a sailing expedition, watersports, and SCUBA certification.

provenance.notes: Imported from camp-finder; raw description and sessions dropped (operational data stays at the council site). The evergreen summary is original prose regenerated from that description, excluding dates/fees/schedules. camp_type classified from program_types.
